picks.quote: I am going to go with Diego Lopez here... I'm going with Diego Lopez by late or mid first round finish over Steve Garcia.
I'm actually going to go with Kyle Daukus. I'm risking it for the biscuit with this prediction.
I'm going against Michael Chandler. Um I'm taking Maurício Rua by brutal, disgusting, despicable palms up, slime out KO in the first round.
I really think Josh Barnett has got this one in the bag, man... I'm going with Barnett, man.
I'm going with Sean O'Malley... I've got O'Malley scoring a nasty KO.
I think Alex Pereira is going to put him away by KO... Alex Pereira round three TKO.
I'm going to go with Ilia Topuria by KO... the favorite Ilia Topuria is actually going to do what he's expected to do, which is put away Justin Gaethje inside two rounds.
